ddls:
CREATE TABLE "applicants" (
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each applicant */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the applicant */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the applicant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the applicant */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the applicant */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program the applicant is applying to */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the applicant is applying to */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date the applicant submitted the application */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the applicant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the applicant */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the applicant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the applicant */,
  "previous_degree" TEXT /* Previous degree of the applicant */,
  "previous_university" TEXT /* Name of the previous university of the applicant */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the applicant record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the applicant record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score record */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the applicant */,
  "gre_score" INTEGER /* GRE score of the applicant */,
  "toefl_score" INTEGER /* TOEFL score of the applicant */,
  "university_rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the undergraduate university (1-5) */,
  "sop" REAL /* Score for the statement of purpose (1-5) */,
  "lor" REAL /* Score for the letter of recommendation (1-5) */,
  "cgpa" REAL /* Cumulative grade point average (CGPA) of the applicant */,
  "research_experience" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the applicant has research experience (0 or 1) */,
  "gpa_scale" REAL /* Scale of the CGPA */,
  "gre_awa_score" REAL /* Analytical Writing score of the GRE */,
  "toefl_speaking_score" INTEGER /* Speaking score of the TOEFL */,
  "toefl_writing_score" INTEGER /* Writing score of the TOEFL */,
  "sop_length" INTEGER /* Length of the statement of purpose in words */,
  "lor_count" INTEGER /* Number of letters of recommendation submitted */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the score record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the score record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_scores_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department offering the program */,
  "program_code" TEXT /* Code or identifier for the program */,
  "admission_requirements" TEXT /* Admission requirements for the program */,
  "program_type" TEXT /* Type of program (e.g., Master's, Ph.D.) */,
  "program_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the program in years */,
  "admission_quota" INTEGER /* Number of seats available for the program */,
  "application_fee" REAL /* Application fee for the program */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the program record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the program record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_programs_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the department */,
  "department_head" TEXT /* Name of the department head */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the department record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the department record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admission_decisions" (
  "decision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each decision record */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the applicant */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program */,
  "decision_date" TEXT /* Date the decision was made */,
  "decision_status" TEXT /* Status of the decision (e.g., admitted, rejected, waitlisted) */,
  "decision_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the decision */,
  "decision_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who made the decision */,
  "decision_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the decision */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the decision record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the decision record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("decision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admission_decisions_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admission_decisions_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status record */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the applicant */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date the status was updated */,
  "status_description" TEXT /* Description of the current status (e.g., received, reviewed, pending decision) */,
  "status_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who updated the status */,
  "status_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the status update */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the status record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the status record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_status_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_status_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admissions officer, faculty member, admin) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the user belongs to */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date the action was performed */,
  "action_description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device from which the action was performed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log record was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
